title: ValidValues
description: A constraint on the acceptable values for an EntityField: an enumeration list, a numeric range, or a regex pattern.

kind.description: The constraint type: enumeration (fixed list), range (numeric min/max), or regex (pattern match).

values.description: The list of allowed values for enumeration constraints. Empty for range and regex constraints.

min.description: Minimum allowed numeric value for range constraints. Null for other kinds.

max.description: Maximum allowed numeric value for range constraints. Null for other kinds.

pattern.description: Regular expression pattern for regex constraints. Null for other kinds.
